    GBM Examples Notebook¶

    This notebook demonstrates MAE plots and comparisons for GBM samplers.

    In [78]:
    Copied! 
    import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from matplotlib.ticker import FixedLocator, FixedFormatter

import config as cf
import averaged_mae as am
import plot_util as pu
    import matplotlib.pyplot as plt from matplotlib.ticker import FixedLocator, FixedFormatter import config as cf import averaged_mae as am import plot_util as pu

    Configuration¶

    Toggle debugging for the demo.

    In [2]:
    Copied! 
    cf.is_debug = False
    cf.is_debug = False

    Standardize figure size across the notebook (width, height) in inches:

    In [3]:
    Copied! 
    FIGSIZE = (6, 4)
plt.rcParams['figure.figsize'] = FIGSIZE
    FIGSIZE = (6, 4) plt.rcParams['figure.figsize'] = FIGSIZE

    MAE vs Number of Paths in QMCPy and QuantLib¶

    In [10]:
    Copied! 
    cf.is_debug = True
replications = 1
am.plot_mae_vs_paths(replications)
    cf.is_debug = True replications = 1 am.plot_mae_vs_paths(replications)
    In [11]:
    Copied! 
    cf.is_debug = False
replications = 1
am.plot_mae_vs_paths(replications)
    cf.is_debug = False replications = 1 am.plot_mae_vs_paths(replications)
    In [104]:
    Copied! 
    replications = 4
am.plot_mae_vs_paths(replications)
    replications = 4 am.plot_mae_vs_paths(replications)

    MAE vs Number of Time Steps in QMCPy and QuantLib¶

    In [52]:
    Copied! 
    cf.is_debug = True
replications = 1
am.plot_mae_vs_steps(replications)
    cf.is_debug = True replications = 1 am.plot_mae_vs_steps(replications)
    In [105]:
    Copied! 
    cf.is_debug = False
replications = 1
am.plot_mae_vs_steps(replications)
    cf.is_debug = False replications = 1 am.plot_mae_vs_steps(replications)
    In [103]:
    Copied! 
    cf.is_debug = False
replications = 4
am.plot_mae_vs_steps(replications)
    cf.is_debug = False replications = 4 am.plot_mae_vs_steps(replications)
